metadata.name: ebrains-drive
metadata.summary: Python client interface for EBRAINS Collaboratory Seafile storage

documentation: coding: UTF-8

documentation: coding: utf-8

functions.name: ebrains_drive.utils._raise_on
documentation:
Decorator factory funciton to turn a function that get a http http_code response
to a `Ex` exception.

functions.name: ebrains_drive.utils.raise_does_not_exist
documentation:
Decorator to turn a function that get a http 404 response to a
{exc}`DoesNotExist` exception.

functions.name: ebrains_drive.utils.utf8lize
documentation: not used?

class_variables.name: ebrains_drive.bucket.Bucket.LIMIT
documentation:
A dataproxy bucket
n.b. for a dataset bucket, role & is_public may be None

methods.name: ebrains_drive.file.File.get_file_by_url
documentation:
Get a single repo associated with specified repo_url
Example inputs:
1) https://drive.ebrains.eu/lib/0fee1620-062d-4643-865b-951de1eee355/file/sample-latest.csv
2) https://drive.ebrains.eu/lib/0fee1620-062d-4643-865b-951de1eee355/file/Dir1/data.json

methods.name: ebrains_drive.file.File.get_file_by_local_path
documentation:
Get the file or directory object corresponding to `local_path`
when the Drive is mounted in the EBRAINS Lab.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.buckets.Buckets.get_bucket
documentation: Get the specified bucket according name. If forced flag is set to True, will attempt to create the collab, if necessary.

classes.name: ebrains_drive.exceptions.ClientHttpError
documentation:
This exception is raised if the returned http response is not as
expected

classes.name: ebrains_drive.exceptions.OperationError
documentation: Expcetion to raise when an opeartion is failed

classes.name: ebrains_drive.exceptions.DoesNotExist
documentation: Raised when not matching resource can be found.

classes.name: ebrains_drive.exceptions.UpstreamAPIException
documentation: This exception is raised if the upstream API returns something unexpected

modules.name: ebrains_drive
documentation:
A Python package for working with the Human Brain Project Model Validation Framework.

Andrew Davison and Shailesh Appukuttan, CNRS, 2017-2020

License: BSD 3-clause, see LICENSE.txt

classes.name: ebrains_drive.client.DriveApiClient

methods.name: ebrains_drive.client.DriveApiClient.__init__
documentation: Wraps various basic operations to interact with seahub http api.
Wraps seafile web api

modules.name: tests.test_files
documentation: coding: UTF-8

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repos.Repos.get_repo
documentation:
Get the repo which has the id `repo_id`.

Raises {exc}`DoesNotExist` if no such repo exists.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repos.Repos.get_repos_by_filter
documentation: Get all repos which have `filter_name` = `filter_value`.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repos.Repos.get_repos_by_name
documentation: Get all repos which have the name `repo_name`.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repos.Repos.get_repo_by_url
documentation:
Get a single repo associated with specified repo_url
Example inputs:
1) https://wiki.ebrains.eu/bin/view/Collabs/collab-testing/subpage
2) wiki.ebrains.eu/bin/view/Collabs/collab-testing
3) collab-testing

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repos.Repos.get_default_repo
documentation: Get the user's default repo (i.e. "My Library")

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repos.Repos.get_repo_by_local_path
documentation:
Get the repo that contains `local_path` when the Drive
is mounted in the EBRAINS Lab.

classes.name: ebrains_drive.repo.Repo

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repo.Repo.get_file
documentation:
Get the file object located in `path` in this repo.

Return a {class}`SeafFile` object

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repo.Repo.get_dir
documentation:
Get the dir object located in `path` in this repo.

Return a {class}`SeafDir` object

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repo.Repo.delete
documentation: Remove this repo. Only the repo owner can do this

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repo.Repo.list_history
documentation:
List the history of this repo

Returns a list of {class}`RepoRevision` object.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repo.Repo.update
documentation:
Update the name of this repo. Only the repo owner can do
this.
# Operations only the repo owner can do:

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repo.Repo.get_settings
documentation:
Get the settings of this repo. Returns a dict containing the following
keys:

`history_limit`: How many days of repo history to keep.
A seafile library

methods.name: ebrains_drive.repo.RepoRevision.restore
documentation: Restore the repo to this revision

classes.name: ebrains_drive.files._SeafDirentBase

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files._SeafDirentBase.__init__
documentation:
{param}`path` the full path of this entry within its repo, like
"/documents/example.md"

{param}`size` The size of a file. It should be zero for a dir.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files._SeafDirentBase.rename
documentation: Change file/folder name to newname

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files._SeafDirentBase.copyTo
documentation: Copy file/folder to other directory (also to a different repo)

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files._SeafDirentBase.moveTo
documentation: Move file/folder to other directory (also to a different repo)

Base class for {class}`SeafFile` and {class}`SeafDir`.

It provides implementation of their common operations.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.ls
documentation:
List the entries in this dir.

Return a list of objects of class {class}`SeafFile` or {class}`SeafDir`.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.create_empty_file
documentation:
Create a new empty file in this dir.
Return a {class}`SeafFile` object of the newly created file.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.check_exists
documentation:
Check if an entity with specified name exists in current directory
Note: seafile doesn't allow even a sub-directory and file,
      within the same directory, to have the same name

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.mkdir
documentation:
Create a new sub folder right under this dir.

Return a {class}`SeafDir` object of the newly created sub folder.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.download
documentation:
Download the entire contents of a directory as a zip file

:param:name The name of the downloaded zip file. 
    If None, the name of the directory (or repo name in case of root directory) would be used.

Returns a dict in following format:
{'zipped': NUM, 'total': NUM, 'failed': NUM, 'failed_reason': '', 'canceled': NUM}

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.upload
documentation:
Upload a file to this folder.

\:param:fileobj {class}`File` like object
\:param:filename The name of the file

Return a {class}`SeafFile` object of the newly uploaded file.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.upload_local_file
documentation:
Upload a file to this folder.

\:param:filepath The path to the local file
\:param:name The name of this new file. If None, the name of the local file would be used.

Return a {class}`SeafFile` object of the newly uploaded file.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafDir.get_uploadable_sharelink
documentation:
Generate a uploadable shared link to this dir.

Return the url of this link.

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafFile.update
documentation: Update the content of this file

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.SeafFile.get_content
documentation: Get the content of the file

methods.name: ebrains_drive.files.DataproxyFile.get_download_link
documentation: n.b. this download link expires in the order of seconds
